tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Look at this photograph[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Every time I do it makes me laugh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
How did our eyes get so red[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And what the hell is on Joey's head[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
This is where I grew up[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I think the present owner fixed it up[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I never knew we ever went without[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
The second floor is hard for sneakin' out[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
This is where I went to school[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Most of the time had better things to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Criminal record says I broke in twice[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I must've done it half a dozen times[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I wonder if it's too late[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Should I go back and try to graduate[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Life's better now than it was back then[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
If I was them I wouldn't let me in ooooooh, oh God I[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of looking out the back door[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
I had my photo album spread out on my bedroom floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of walking out the front door[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
I found the photo of the friend that I was looking for[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]
Remember the old arcade[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Blew every dollar that we ever made[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]A[/ch]                                      [ch]E[/ch]
The cops hated us hangin' out, they say somebody went and burned it down[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
We used to listen to the radio, and sing along with every song we know[/tab]
[tab]                                                             [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
We said someday we'd find out how it feels, to sing to more than just the steering wheel[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]B[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
Kim's the first girl I kissed, I was so nervous that I nearly missed[/tab]
[tab]                                                   [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
She had a couple of kids since then, I haven't seen her since God knows when[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, whoa whoa, oh God I, I[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of looking out the back door[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
I had my photo album spread out on my bedroom floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of walking out the front door[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
I found the photo of the friend that I was looking for[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I miss the town[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I miss their faces[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You can't erase[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You can't replace it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I miss it now[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I can't believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So hard to stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Too hard to leave it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
If I could relive those days[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
I know the one thing that would never change[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of looking out the back door[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
I had my photo album spread out on my bedroom floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Every memory of walking out the front door[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]
I found the photo of the friend that I was looking for[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's hard to say, it's time to say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Goodbye, goodbye[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Look at this photograph[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Every time I do it makes me laugh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Every time I do it makes me[/tab]
